/usr/bin/g++ -g "CMakeFiles/rv32i-emu.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/rv32i-emu.dir/core/CPU/CPU.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/rv32i-emu.dir/core/MMU/MMU.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/rv32i-emu.dir/core/Instructionset/Instructionset.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/rv32i-emu.dir/core/debug/DebugUI.cpp.o" -o rv32i-emu  /usr/local/lib/libftxui-screen.a /usr/local/lib/libftxui-dom.a /usr/local/lib/libftxui-component.a /usr/local/lib/libftxui-dom.a /usr/local/lib/libftxui-screen.a
